sphurita p. p.
1 Trembling, throbbing.
2 Shaken.
3 Glittering, shining.
4 Unsteady.
5 Swollen.
6 Manifested, displayed;  Māl. 2. 10. 
— taṃ
1 A throb, palpitation, tremor.
2 Agitation or emotion of the mind.
